name: nest-js
description: Guidance for designing and implementing NestJS backend projects safely and idiomatically.

interface.longDescription: Use this plugin when designing, building, refactoring, debugging, reviewing, or testing NestJS backend applications with TypeScript and clean modular architecture.
defaultPrompt: Design this NestJS feature before implementation.
Help me change this NestJS backend safely.
Review this NestJS module for bugs.
